metadata.description: Set up LaTeX manuscript structure from existing drafts, update TRACE with project context, and evaluate publication venues

summary: Created complete LaTeX manuscript structure for ACM C&C 2026 submission. Updated journal_targets.md with ACM C&C and Arts in Society conference info. Converted all RTF sections to LaTeX with proper citations. Created BibTeX bibliography with 25+ references. Mapped 6 available figures to appropriate manuscript sections. Established publication strategy: empirical paper to C&C, methods paper (consensus UMAP + MLP projection head) to methods venue.
